overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game featuring Miles Morales walking through an urban park at sunset. The character travels along a winding paved path past pedestrians, park benches, and a blue vendor tent, with modern skyscrapers visible through autumn trees and strong golden-hour lighting creating long shadows and reflections on the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban park path alongside water with stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved park path, passing pedestrians coming from the opposite direction

entered.detail: arched stone bridge crossing over water on the left side of the path
calm water body reflecting the sunset colors alongside the path
red-brown paved walkway with puddles reflecting the golden light
tall trees with autumn foliage lining both sides of the path
tall glass and steel buildings visible through the trees in the background
orange safety fencing running along the left side near the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Miles Morales walking along a curved park path during golden hour. A stone bridge arches over water to the left, while modern skyscrapers rise in the distant right background. The path is wet with reflective puddles, and scattered pedestrians walk in the opposite direction past autumn trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: park path approaching vendor area with city skyline views

events.description: blue vendor tent comes into view ahead on the right side of the path
passing the blue vendor tent on the right, moving deeper into the park

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path, approaching and passing the blue vendor tent while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing under the blue tent near potted plants

entered.detail: purple-blue canopy tent with vendor and goods visible underneath
ornate black lamppost with glass enclosure on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the character walks deeper into the park, a blue vendor tent appears on the right side of the path. The stone bridge and water recede from view while the city skyline becomes more prominent directly ahead. The path continues to curve right, passing the tent and moving toward an area with park benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: park path lined with benches and seated pedestrians

events.description: wooden park benches appear lining the right side with people sitting and conversing
approaching a group of pedestrians standing ahead on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking past seated people on park benches and approaching a standing group near the construction fence

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a park bench watching the sunset
group of four people standing together near the construction fence

entered.detail: green wooden benches with people sitting, lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character walking along a path lined with wooden park benches on the right, where people sit enjoying the sunset. The blue vendor tent is now behind, and a tall skyscraper dominates the center background. The character approaches a group of people standing near the orange construction fence on the left as the sun creates a strong lens flare ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a scenic urban park that shifts from a waterfront vista to a bustling pedestrian walkway under a brilliant sunset. It begins with Miles Morales walking along a curved, wet path beside a stone bridge and reflective puddles, with modern skyscrapers framing the distant horizon. As he moves deeper into the park, the bridge recedes and the city skyline becomes more prominent directly ahead, while the camera passes a blue vendor tent on the right. The scene then shifts toward a stretch of the path lined with wooden benches and resting pedestrians, leaving the tent behind. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a group of people near an orange construction fence as a tall skyscraper dominates the center background and a strong lens flare washes over the frame.
